ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus where the facility is located */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building within the campus */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., classroom, lab, office) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the facility (e.g., square footage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the facility can accommodate */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the facility was opened or last renovated */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information about the facility's accessibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., High or Excellent, Above Average) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score corresponding to the rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the rating */,
  "rating_value" TEXT /* Value of the rating (e.g., 28, 36.4) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the rating */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the rating */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was conducted */,
  "improvement_needed" TEXT /* Flag indicating if improvements are needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_ratings_rating_value FOREIGN KEY ("rating_value") REFERENCES quality_ratings ("rating_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_ratings_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_ratings_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., projector, microscope) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the equipment (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty expires */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "expected_lifetime" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the equipment in years */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor who supplied the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_equipment_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "inspection_required" TEXT /* Flag indicating if an inspection is required after maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES facilities_equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_improvements" (
  "improvement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each improvement */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "improvement_date" TEXT /* Date of the improvement */,
  "improvement_type" TEXT /* Type of improvement (e.g., renovation, upgrade) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the improvement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the improvement (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the improvement */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date of completion for the improvement */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date of completion for the improvement */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("improvement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_improvements_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, maintenance staff, financial officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, report) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility (if applicable) */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES facilities_equipment ("equipment_id")
)
